title: Korean-Style Savory Bowl
description: A savory and flavorful bowl filled with tender beef, crunchy kimchi, and creamy avocado. Serve as a filling snack or light meal.
instructions: 1. In a large pan or wok, heat 1 tablespoon of oil over medium-high heat.
2. Add the sliced beef and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
3. Add the kimchi, brown rice, green onions, and toasted sesame seeds (if using) to the pan.
4. Stir-fry everything together for about 2-3 minutes.
5. In a small bowl, whisk together the gochujang sauce and soy sauce (if using).
6. Pour the sauce over the beef and kimchi mixture, and stir-fry for another minute.
7. Taste and adjust the seasoning with salt and black pepper.
8. Serve the beef and kimchi mixture over the brown rice in a bowl.
9. Top with diced avocado and any additional garnishes (such as toasted sesame seeds or chopped green onions).
